question.text: When a support level is broken, it typically:

answer.text: Disappears completely and has no further significance
Becomes a new resistance level due to trapped traders and shifted sentiment
Causes the stock to be delisted

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Role reversal: broken support becomes resistance. Trapped buyers who didn't sell at support now wait to exit at breakeven, creating selling pressure at that level. **The Trap:** Broken support doesn't disappear — it transforms into resistance. This is one of the most important TA concepts. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 15 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Use this principle for entry/exit: after support breaks, wait for a retest of that level (now resistance) to enter short positions.
